name: Johnson Controls OpenBlue / Metasys API
what_it_does: Johnson Controls OpenBlue and Metasys REST APIs for smart building and building management system (BMS) platform. Enables AI agents to manage building equipment control and setpoint automation for energy and comfort optimization, handle real-time building data retrieval from HVAC, lighting, and access control systems, access predictive maintenance alerts and equipment health scoring for facilities management, retrieve energy consumption analytics and demand response event management, manage space utilization and occupancy data for workplace optimization, handle HVAC fault detection and diagnostics (FDD) for performance optimization, access chiller, boiler, and air handler equipment data for plant optimization, retrieve security and access control event data for facilities operations, manage fire safety and life safety system integration, and integrate building data with CMMS, ERP, and IoT platforms.
use_cases: Automating HVAC control from building energy management agents
Monitoring equipment health from predictive maintenance agents
Analyzing occupancy patterns from workplace intelligence agents
Managing demand response from grid-interactive building agents
not_for: Residential smart home without enterprise commercial building BMS
Industrial process automation without commercial facilities focus
Simple energy monitoring without building control and automation integration
best_when: A commercial building owner or facilities manager using Johnson Controls OpenBlue or Metasys BMS wants AI agents to automate energy optimization, predictive maintenance, occupancy analysis, and building system integration.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: Metasys and OpenBlue control access to life safety systems including fire suppression, elevator recall, and emergency lighting — automated control of safety systems without certified BAS technician oversight creates liability and safety hazards. HVAC control automation without occupant comfort validation and freeze protection is a property risk in extreme temperatures.

auth.notes: Johnson Controls OpenBlue uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.johnsoncontrols.com. OpenBlue is cloud platform wrapping Metasys on-premise BMS via OpenBlue Enterprise Manager. Webhooks for building event notifications. REST API with JSON. Metasys API also available for on-premise integration. Milwaukee, Wisconsin HQ.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-building and per-point subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per building and device point count; enterprise pricing for portfolio
pricing.notes: Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Founded 1885. Public (JCI NYSE). $24B+ annual revenue. Smart building and HVAC market. 10,000+ employees in building technology. OpenBlue launched 2020 as cloud-native platform. Strong in commercial real estate, healthcare, and campus facilities. Competes with Siemens and Honeywell for enterprise BMS.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; varies by building gateway capacity

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: OpenBlue controls life safety systems including fire and emergency lighting; automated control of safety systems without certified oversight creates safety and liability risks
Metasys on-premise vs. OpenBlue cloud — Metasys API is on-premise REST API; OpenBlue wraps Metasys via cloud gateway; understand which API surface your deployment uses
Gateway commissioning required — OpenBlue cloud API requires OpenBlue Enterprise Manager (OBEM) gateway installation and commissioning for each building; cloud access is not instantaneous
Building point subscription model — API data access is per building data point; high-granularity access to all sensors may require significant point subscription costs
HVAC control conflicts — manual override by on-site technicians conflicts with automated setpoints; implement override detection before automated control resumes
Equipment interlock dependencies — HVAC equipment has safety interlocks; automated commands that violate interlock sequences are rejected; understand interlock logic before automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Commercial building BMS and smart building. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. HVAC control, access, and building sensor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Building management systems. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Physical building control and occupancy data.
